entities.context: Vrijen Attawar, career coach advising Daniel

entities.name: Tiger Parent Metaphor
entities.context: Framework for understanding harsh inner self-talk as a learned pattern from immigrant upbringing rather than inherent truth

entities.name: Knowledge Indexing
entities.context: Idea that personal ideas and experiments can be indexed and reused over time

entities.name: Negative Self-Talk
entities.context: Harsh inner voice reframed as a learned pattern rather than a truth about oneself

entities.name: Resume Location Strategy
entities.context: Guidance to signal real willingness to relocate rather than listing 'remote' or specific cities

entities.name: Salary Floor Strategy
entities.context: Keep salary off the resume; use a personal floor instead of disclosing salary history

relationships.context: V provides career coaching and self-development guidance to Daniel
